description_long: This is a full-size black keyboard featuring a standard QWERTY layout with a dedicated numeric keypad on the right. The keys are low-profile and rectangular, with white legends and some red accent keys, notably the TrackPoint nub and select function keys. The keyboard has a slim, flat profile with a slightly raised back, and visible silver feet or risers along the bottom edge. The surface appears to be made of matte plastic, with a few glossy highlights around the TrackPoint and indicator lights. The overall design is modern and professional, suitable for office or urban workspace environments.
description: A slim, full-size black keyboard with a numeric keypad, red TrackPoint, and white key legends, featuring a modern matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, including the numeric keypad and red TrackPoint.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the low-profile keys and the raised back edge with visible risers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the silver risers and the keyboard's flat, slim profile.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the low-profile keys and the raised back edge.
